name: a-raj-monorepo
description: A RAJ - Böngészős MMO Stratégiai Játék (Monorepo)

scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
